text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch the Takarazuka Kinen with Satono
Diamond. Kitasan Black runs rather poorly and
suffers a defeat. The crowd is baffled by her
irregular performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black must have pushed herself too hard
in her training after the exhausting spring Tenno
Sho and worn herself out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is distraught from having
disappointed everyone, but Satono Diamond
gently comforts her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the fans watch Kitasan Black trying her
best, they see themselves in her and want to
cheer her on. They almost certainly don't want to
see her give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but Satono Diamond is hoping the
same. With that said, she leaves Kitasan Black to
find the answers for herself.
